message:
test(core): add proptest coverage for e2compr, adler32, and inode version

Three new property-based tests in the proptest_tests module:
- e2compr_roundtrip_identity: compress→decompress is identity for
  arbitrary data (1-4096 bytes) with both gzip and LZO methods
- adler32_deterministic: same seed+data always produces same checksum
- inode_version_monotonic: bump_inode_version increments by exactly 1
  (wrapping at u64::MAX) for arbitrary initial values

These cover the most critical untested paths from the recent e2compr
and i_version implementations.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
